positive: Minimalist abstract illustration of a roaring lion head silhouetted against a vibrant cosmic nebula background. The style should be modern graphic design mixed with psychedelic art, featuring deep sapphire blues, iridescent golds, and magenta accents. The composition must be perfectly centralized and symmetrical, designed for apparel printing. Emphasize sharp, bold lines and high contrast. The lion silhouette should appear powerful and majestic, rendered with clean geometric shapes. Lighting is dramatic, simulating starlight filtering through mist. Ultra-detailed vector quality, print-ready, flat aesthetic.
negative: blurry, low quality, watermark, logo, text, artifact, noise, grain, jpeg artifacts, out of focus, messy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, bad anatomy
